options.label: Ranged Damage
options.description: Damage dealt by the player with bows, firearms, and other ranged weapons.

options.label: Melee Damage
options.description: Damage dealt by the player with melee weapons and tools.

options.label: Terrain Damage
options.description: How much damage players deal to terrain.

options.label: Headshot Multiplier
options.description: Multiplier applied to headshot damage players deal to entities.

options.label: Player Damage In
options.description: How much damage the player receives from all sources.

options.label: Walk Speed
options.description: Adjusts player movement speed while walking.

options.label: Run Speed
options.description: Adjusts player movement speed while running.

options.label: Crouch Speed
options.description: Adjusts player movement speed while crouching.

options.label: Jump Strength
options.description: Modifies player jump height.

options.label: Stamina Regen
options.description: Controls the rate stamina regenerates. Values are approximate.

options.label: Stamina Usage
options.description: Stamina cost for actions like running, jumping, and attacking. Values are approximate.

options.label: XP Multiplier
options.description: Multiplier applied to all experience gained.

options.label: Show XP
options.description: Hide or show the XP bar and XP pop-up on screen.

options.label: Level Stat Bonus
options.description: Determines whether health and stamina increase per level.

options.label: Skill Gain Rate
options.description: Adjusts how many levels are required to earn skill points.

options.label: Skill Gain Amount
options.description: Controls how many skill points are gained when skill points are awarded.

options.label: Death Penalty
options.description:
Determines the death penalty applied after death.

None = No penalty.
XP Only = Classic XP loss.
Injured = Some debuffs persist and food/water is reset to 50% on respawn.
Permanent Death = Character reset.

options.label: Lose On Death
options.description:
Sets which items are considered for loss on death.

All = All items.
Toolbelt = Only toolbelt items.
Backpack = Only backpack items.
Equipment = Worn armor and clothing.
Carried Only = Items from toolbelt and backpack.

options.label: Death Loss Count
options.description: Sets the number of random items lost on death.

options.label: Death Degradation
options.description:
Sets whether items degrade on death.

None = no loss.
Durability = Reduces an amount of current durability, which can be repaired.
Max Durability = Reduces maximum durability, lowering the repair cap.
Both = Items lose both current and maximum durability.

options.label: Death Degradation Amount
options.description: When Death Degradation is enabled, this setting determines the percentage of durability lost on death.

options.label: Drop On Death
options.description:
Which items are dropped on death.

Nothing = Drop nothing.
Everything = Drop both backpack and toolbelt.
Toolbelt = Drop items on toolbelt.
Backpack = Drop items in the backpack.
Delete All = Delete all items.

options.label: Drop On Quit
options.description:
Which items are dropped on quit.

Nothing = Drop nothing.
Everything = Drop both backpack and toolbelt.
Toolbelt = Drop items on toolbelt.
Backpack = Drop items in the backpack.

options.label: Infection Rate
options.description: Adjusts how quickly infections progress.

options.label: New Player Buff
options.description: If enabled, new players spawn with the beginner protection buff.

options.label: Encumbrance Slots
options.description: Controls the number of encumbered backpack slots. Values are Disabled (no encumbrance) to Full (maximum encumbrance). Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Jar Refund
options.description: Chance of jars returned from consuming items.

options.label: Enemy Spawning
options.description: Enable or disable enemy spawning.

options.label: Max Enemy Tier
options.description: Highest tier of zombie types that can spawn.

options.label: Enemy Density
options.description: Overrides biome enemy density and sets how many enemies spawn in each biome. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Enemy Respawn
options.description: Increases the respawn rate of enemies in active biomes. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Biome Animal Respawn
options.description: Increases the respawn rate of animals in active biomes. Affects non-zombie passive and aggressive food sources. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Enemy Damage Dealt
options.description: Controls how much damage enemies do to players. This stacks with other incoming damage players receive.

options.label: Entity Damage In
options.description: Damage entities, such as enemies and animals, receive from players.

options.label: Enemy Block Damage
options.description: How much damage enemies deal to blocks.

options.label: BM Block Damage
options.description: Damage enemies do to blocks during Blood Moons.

options.label: Headshot Mode
options.description:
Determines how headshot damage is handled.

Headshot Only = enemies can only be damaged by headshots.
Headshot Finisher = body shots deal damage, but only a headshot can finish them.

Does not apply to passive animals.

options.label: Entity Health Bars
options.description: Show or hide entity health bars.

options.label: Show Entity Damage
options.description: Display floating damage numbers when entities are hit.

options.label: Zombie Day Speed
options.description: Sets zombie movement speed during daytime for normal zombies. Does not affect ferals and specials.

options.label: Zombie Night Speed
options.description: Sets zombie movement speed at night for normal zombies. Does not affect ferals and specials.

options.label: Zombie Feral Speed
options.description: Sets movement speed of feral zombies.

options.label: Zombie BM Speed
options.description: Controls zombie movement speed during Blood Moon hordes and storms.

options.label: Zombie Feral Sense
options.description: How easily zombies detect players through sight and sound.

options.label: AI Smell Mode
options.description: Enable or disable zombie scent tracking, and sets how fast they move when they detect a smell.

options.label: Zombie Rage
options.description: Chance for zombies to enter rage mode when damaged.

options.label: Zombie Digging
options.description: Allow zombies to dig down through terrain. Can still dig sideways.

options.label: Zombies Eat Animals
options.description: Determines whether zombies eat animal corpses.

options.label: Global Game Stage
options.description: Determines enemy types, difficulty scaling, loot quality, and Blood Moon intensity based on your level and days survived. A higher value increases difficulty. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Biome Game Stage
options.description: Biome based difficulty modifier. Harder biomes raise enemy strength and loot stage beyond your base progression. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Biome Progression
options.description: Enable biome hazards. Weather and Storms are not affected by this setting.

options.label: Temperature Survival
options.description: Controls whether environmental temperature (hot and cold) affect the player.

options.label: Max Tech Type
options.description:
Globally sets the highest available tech type for weapons and items allowing control over progression and gameplay pacing. See examples below.

Tech 0 = Stone and pipe
Tech 1 = Iron and AK
Tech 2 = Steel and Tactical Assault
Tech 3 = Auger and M60

options.label: Workstations In The Wild
options.description: Allow functional workstations to spawn in world. Applied on new Navezgane or RWG map generation.

options.label: Blood Moon Frequency
options.description: Number of in-game days between Blood Moons. Disabled = No Blood Moons.

options.label: Blood Moon Range
options.description:
Number of days after Blood Moon frequency the event can occur.

For example: A frequency of 7 + a range of 5 randomizes the Blood Moon between day 7 and day 12.

0 Days = No randomness.

options.label: Blood Moon Count
options.description:
Controls the maximum number of zombies alive Per Player during a Blood Moon.

Nearby players share a group cap of up to 30 zombies. If the cap would be exceeded, game stage scaling increases the difficulty instead. The world cap is about 1.9x the MaxSpawnedZombies. Lower game stages can reduce the number of spawns.

Increasing this setting can greatly impact performance.

options.label: Blood Moon Warning
options.description: Sets when the Blood Moon warning appears on the HUD and the day number changes to red.

options.label: Air Drops
options.description: How often supply drops occur.

options.label: Air Drop Variance
options.description: Allows control over when the air drops appear. Pick a specific time for predictable air drops, or Any for total randomness. None = the default noon air drop.

options.label: Storm Frequency
options.description: Adjusts the frequency of storms. None disables storms.

options.label: Storm Warning
options.description: Controls whether the player hears the storm siren and sees an on-screen storm warning.

options.label: Heat Map Sensitivity
options.description: Controls heat buildup from player activity. Higher heat increases the chance for screamer spawns. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: 24 Hour Cycle
options.description: How many real life minutes it takes for 24 hours to pass in the game.

options.label: Daylight Length
options.description:
Sets the number of in-game daylight hours. Always Night and Always Day behave as expected. Daylight duration settings:

 4 = 10:00 - 14:00
 6 = 09:00 - 15:00
 8 = 08:00 - 16:00
10 = 07:00 - 17:00
12 = 06:00 - 18:00
14 = 05:00 - 19:00
16 = 04:00 - 20:00
18 = 04:00 - 22:00
20 = 02:00 - 22:00

options.label: Allow Map
options.description: Enable in-game map.

options.label: Allow Compass
options.description: Show player compass.

options.label: Allow Screen Markers
options.description: Show on-screen navigational markers. Map markers remain visible.

options.label: Show Location Info
options.description: Show biome and POI name and difficulty.

options.label: Show Day/Time
options.description: Show on-screen day and time information. If set to No, Bloodmoon Warning is also disabled.

options.label: Max Loot Tier
options.description: Sets the highest quality tier of weapons and items that can appear in loot.

options.label: Global Loot Stage
options.description: Global multiplier applied to player loot stage. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Biome Loot Stage
options.description: Loot stage multiplier applied per biome. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: POI Loot Stage
options.description: Loot stage multiplier based on POI tier. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Loot Respawn Days
options.description: The number of in-game days before loot containers in unvisited areas reset.

options.label: Loot Timer
options.description: Time required to loot containers.

options.label: Loot Bag Drop
options.description: Multiplier applied to chance for enemies to drop loot bags on death.

options.label: Food Abundance
options.description: Amount of food found in containers.

options.label: Drink Abundance
options.description: Amount of drinks found in containers.

options.label: Medical Abundance
options.description: Amount of medical supplies found in loot.

options.label: Ammo Abundance
options.description: Amount of ammo found in loot.

options.label: Resource Abundance
options.description: Amount of resource items found in loot.

options.label: Armor Abundance
options.description: Amount of armor and armor parts found in loot.

options.label: Melee Abundance
options.description: Amount of melee weapons and parts found in loot.

options.label: Ranged Abundance
options.description: Amount of ranged weapons and parts found in loot.

options.label: Currency Abundance
options.description: Amount of Duke coins and old cash found in loot.

options.label: Magazine Abundance
options.description: Amount of crafting magazines found in loot.

options.label: Book Abundance
options.description: Amount of books and schematics found in loot.

options.label: Treasure Map Chance
options.description: Multiplier applied to chance for treasure maps to spawn in loot containers and enemy loot bags.

options.label: Mining Yield
options.description: Controls the amount of ore gained from mining. Can impact in-game challenges if disabled.

options.label: Crop Yield
options.description: Controls the amount of resources harvested from wild and player planted crops. Can impact in-game challenges if disabled.

options.label: Seed Drop
options.description: The amount of seeds gained from player planted crop harvest. Does not increase the chance for seeds dropping or seeds from trees.

options.label: Resource Yield
options.description: Controls the amount of resources gained from harvesting blocks and items. Does not affect ores, seeds, or crops. Can impact in-game challenges if disabled.

options.label: Crop Growth
options.description: Adjusts growth speed of player-planted crops and trees. A higher percent results in longer growth time. Note: Existing saves will require replanting crops for changes to take effect.

options.label: Crafting Progression
options.description: Enable or disable magazine and schematic based crafting progression.

options.label: Crafting Max Tier
options.description: Highest quality tier of crafted items.

options.label: Magazine Progress
options.description: The progression gained from reading skill magazines.

options.label: Backpack Crafting
options.description:
Controls what items the player can craft directly from their backpack.

No disables backpack crafting.
Yes allows crafting in the backpack.
Limited allows crafting a limited list of recipes in the backpack.
Workbench Only allows crafting of the workbench, but nothing else is crafted in the backpack.

options.label: Workstation Crafting
options.description: Yes allows crafting in workstations. No allows player backpack crafting only.

options.label: Smelter Type
options.description: Controls how forge crafting works. Smelt items into the forge or craft directly using materials from your backpack.

options.label: Crafting Timer
options.description: Time required to craft items.

options.label: Crafting Cost
options.description: Amount of materials required for crafting (excludes resource bundles).

options.label: Crafting Yield
options.description: Number of items produced per craft (excludes resource bundles).

options.label: Scrapping Yield
options.description: Amount received when scrapping items.

options.label: Dew Collector Time
options.description: Adjusts the time it takes for the dew collector to produce water.

options.label: Dew Collector Yield
options.description: The amount of water the dew collector generates per cycle.

options.label: Dew Collector Input
options.description: Sets the number of jars required to begin dew collection.

options.label: Apiary Time
options.description: Adjusts the time it takes for the apiary to produce honey.

options.label: Apiary Yield
options.description: The amount of honey generated per production cycle.

options.label: Apiary Input
options.description: Sets the amount of flowers needed to begin honey production.

options.label: Item Degradation
options.description: How fast weapons and tools lose durability. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Repair Method
options.description:
Determines how items are repaired:

None = No repair
Repair Only = Repair Kits Only
Combine Only = Repair on Combine Station
Both = Repair Kits and Combine Station

options.label: Repair Degradation
options.description: Determines how much an item degrades when repaired.

options.label: Trading Enabled
options.description: Enable trading with NPC traders.

options.label: Vending Enabled
options.description: Enable or disable vending machine functionality.

options.label: Trader Hours
options.description:
Controls trader opening and closing hours. 24 Hour Cycle and Daylight Length do not affect this setting. BM Closed means closed only during blood moon. Default uses XML values.

XML Default = 04:00-22:00
       Morning = 04:00-12:00
       Mid Day = 10:00-18:00
       Evening = 16:00-22:00
           Night = 22:00-04:00

options.label: Trader Protection
options.description: Sets damage protection for trader compounds, and whether players can claim the area.

options.label: Trading Dialog
options.description: Toggles the trader voice lines and on-screen dialogue.

options.label: Global Trader Stage
options.description: Global modifier for trader stage progression. Controls the quality and variety of items sold by traders. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Trader Max Tier
options.description: Sets the highest quality tier available for purchase from the trader.

options.label: Trader Item Count
options.description: The quantity of items for sale at the trader. Lower values make supplies more limited and scarce. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Vending Item Count
options.description: The quantity of items for sale in trader vending machines. Lower values make supplies more limited and scarce. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Trader Reset
options.description: Sets how often traders reset inventory. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Vending Reset
options.description: Sets how often trader vending machines reset inventory. Default uses XML config values.

options.label: Sell Price
options.description: Adjusts the price for items players sell to traders.

options.label: Buy Price
options.description: Adjusts the price for items players purchase from traders.

options.label: Trader Buy Limit
options.description: Maximum number of each item the trader will buy before refusing more. Lower values limit how much you can sell per restock cycle.

options.label: Challenges
options.description: Enable the in-game challenge system.

options.label: Quests
options.description: Enable or disable quests in your game.

options.label: Intro Challenges
options.description: Enable the step-by-step introductory challenge for new players.

options.label: Intro Quest
options.description: Bypass the opening buried supply quest to access full quest progression.

options.label: Trade Routes
options.description: Enable the option to receive quests to other traders.

options.label: Buried Quests
options.description: Allow buried quests to appear in the trader quest lists. No = only POI quests.

options.label: POI Quests
options.description: Allow POI quests to appear in the trader quest lists. No = only buried quests.

options.label: Quests Per Tier
options.description: Number of completed quests required to unlock the next tier. Higher values slow progression between tiers. None = no limit and allows access to all quest tiers.

options.label: Quests Per Day
options.description: Number of daily quests that count towards trader progression. Additional quests still grant XP and rewards, but do not advance trader tier progresssion.

options.label: Base Skill Points
options.description: Number of skill points awarded after completing intro challenges, or at game start if the intro challenges are disabled.

options.label: Vehicle Fuel Usage
options.description: Adjusts the fuel consumption rate for vehicles.

options.label: Vehicle Entity Damage
options.description: How much damage vehicles do to entities.

options.label: Vehicle Block Damage
options.description: How much damage vehicles do to blocks.

options.label: Vehicle Self Damage
options.description: How much damage your vehicle receives from collisions.

options.label: Electrical Output
options.description: Controls how much electrical power is produced.

options.label: Celebrate Kills
options.description: Enable celebratory confetti particles on entity kill. "Headshots Only" option triggers confetti for headshot kills. Does not apply to passive animals.

options.label: Big Heads
options.description: Enable a "big head mode" on zombies, animals, and traders.

options.label: Tiny Zombies
options.description: Enable smaller versions of the zombies.

options.label: Gravity
options.description: Controls the amount of gravity in-game.

options.label: Silly Sounds
options.description: Enable humorous sounds for in-game actions.

options.label: Black and White
options.description: Enable a classic, greyscale palette inspired by classic 1960's horror films.
